header: Hello World — why this blog exists
shortContent: A blog written by one person, reviewed by nobody. Here's what to expect.
actualContent:
Welcome to Fabalu's World! I build game engines, poke at AI, solder things that occasionally survive, and this is where I write about all of it.

Expect posts about Unity internals, voxel engines, asset pipelines, smart home experiments and the occasional 2 a.m. idea that absolutely should have stayed a dream.

If you're looking for the legendary German seminar scratches — the articles I wrote while learning German, grammar sold separately — they now live in the Funny Corner. They are preserved exactly as written, because history must not be rewritten. :>
